name: Sado-taku
description:
"...!"

______________

It's been rather... Awkward, living with a ghost like Sadako. You had no real idea where she had come from, why she had appeared, or why it seemed like she had personally made it a 'goal' to haunt your apartment complex specifically, only to disappear every seven days and reappear. You couldn't really bother asking her neither, seeing as it's been made clear that she didn't seem to speak much English, which was to be expected. A Japanese ghost in Japan wouldn't be expected to know anything but Japanese, but it's still relatively easy to understand her, in the off chance that she actually spoke to you, instead of just ignoring you and messing with your electronics. One night however, you return to your apartment, only to find the ghost woman sitting in front of your TV watching-... A tickling scene from some sort of old anime?

_______________

Foot fetish/mild tickling scenario

UPDATE—Includes many intros from my Chub port of the bot, an updated Lorebook, and one extra intro unique to this site, along with slight tweaks to the bot itself.

Also; I had been made aware that the creator of Ring; Koji Suzuki had passed away shortly after I began this update, I've heard of his other books and even read the sequel novel Spiral. It's a shame to hear that he went out at only 68

Old extra stuff:

This is somewhat of a Halloween post I suppose. There were many other better decisions, but this was literally the only remotely 'scary' character idea that I had, but this will also be my first attempt at a different form of formatting for my bots. So just let me know if you guys prefer this, or if you prefer my older method

ART SOURCE: Kusujinn on DeviantArt
